summary: ESTP→Courage vertu mapping fix verified. The bug fix in calculate_vertus_profile() with MBTI_TO_VERTU_FALLBACK mapping is working correctly. When VV (vertus/valeurs) questions are NOT answered, the system now correctly uses MBTI type to determine the dominant vertu via fallback. ESTP gets 'Courage', INTJ gets 'Sagesse', ENFP gets 'Transcendance', ISTJ gets 'Justice'.

Backend API Tests (9/9 passed).test_02_estp_profile_gets_courage_vertu: PASSED - ESTP correctly gets 'Courage' as dominant vertu
Backend API Tests (9/9 passed).test_03_intj_profile_gets_sagesse_vertu: PASSED - INTJ correctly gets 'Sagesse' as dominant vertu
Backend API Tests (9/9 passed).test_04_access_code_generated: PASSED - Access code XXXX-XXXX format generated
Backend API Tests (9/9 passed).test_05_profile_contains_all_expected_se: PASSED - profile_summary, best_match, access_code, cross_analysis present
Backend API Tests (9/9 passed).test_07_vertu_scores_are_zero_when_no_vv: PASSED - Raw scores are 0, but fallback correctly applied

Frontend UI Tests.Landing page: PASSED - DE'CLIC PRO landing with 2 path cards visible
Frontend UI Tests.Visual questionnaire: PASSED - 26 questions answered with visual/ranking choices
Frontend UI Tests.Profile loading: PASSED - AI analysis loading indicator shown

bug_verification.original_bug: All MBTI profiles were getting 'Sagesse' by default when VV questions not answered

critical_code_review_comments: MBTI_TO_VERTU_FALLBACK correctly maps all 16 MBTI types to appropriate vertus
calculate_vertus_profile() correctly checks if VV questions were answered (total_score > 0)
Fallback logic properly uses mbti_type parameter when VV scores are zero
Both /api/job-match and /api/explore endpoints pass MBTI type to calculate_vertus_profile()

test_data_used.ESTP_answers: v1=E, v2=E, v3=S, v4=S1,S2,N1,N2, v5=T, v6=T, v7=P, v8=P (no vv1-vv6)
test_data_used.INTJ_answers: v1=I, v2=I, v3=N, v4=N1,N2,S1,S2, v5=T, v6=T, v7=J, v8=J (no vv1-vv6)

seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - tested via API with specific answer patterns
context_for_next_testing_agent: ESTP→Courage mapping fix verified. MBTI_TO_VERTU_FALLBACK constant at line 4960 maps all 16 MBTI types to appropriate dominant+secondary vertus. When VV questions (vv1-vv6) are not answered, calculate_vertus_profile() uses this mapping as fallback. Test file test_estp_vertu_mapping.py covers the verification.
